# 🧩 Pull Request

Thank you for contributing! 🎉  


## 💬 Description
Elaborate on your Wonderful Work!
Breifly describe what this PR does and why it’s needed.

<!--
Example:
> Added a soil moisture calibration screen to improve clarity for students during testing.

Include links to any relevant issues (if relevant):
Please explain anything that can help reviewers understand your approach.
-->

## 📜 Changelogs
List the key changes made in the PR. Doesn't have to be more than a line per major change. 

<!--
Example:
- Updated GUI layout for sensor selection  
- Fixed data parsing bug for serial input  
- Added documentation for setup
-->

## 🧪 Steps to Test
How does someone test your awesome work? 
Guide others through testing your changes.  

<!--
Example:
1. Pull this branch  
2. Run `python main.py`  
3. Select the “Farming Food GUI” tab  
4. Confirm the sensor readings display correctly
-->

## 📸 Screenshots / Videos (OPTIONAL)
Add some Shiny Screenshots or Videos Demonstrating the Feature (if applicable)

<!--
Visuals help reviewers see what’s new instantly.
-->
